description: Baseline: Build ~3048ms, Tests ~3725ms, Total ~6773ms. 978 tests pass.
Added --minify flag to both build scripts. Result: Test failures in BeadGateway (3 tests failed). Likely unrelated flaky tests or minification broke something. Reverting.

Remove redundant root build of warcraft-core and rely on opencode-warcraft prebuild. Median of 3 runs: 6093ms total (build 2207/2068/2224ms, tests 3886/4013/4084ms). Full suite passed; benchmark script still reports stale test count from first package only.
Make generate-skills quiet and skip rewriting registry.generated.ts when unchanged. Median of 3 runs: 5909ms total (build 2113/2037/2170ms, tests 3796/3750/4166ms). Full suite passed.

Tried enabling TypeScript incremental declaration builds with .tsbuildinfo in both package tsconfig files. First run was 6147ms, but subsequent build failed because warcraft-core declarations were no longer emitted reliably before opencode-warcraft typecheck, causing TS7016 missing declaration errors for workspace imports.

Tried replacing nested opencode-warcraft prebuild with explicit root orchestration using a new build:standalone script. Median of 3 runs worsened to 6285ms total (build 2114/2032/2161ms, tests 3924/5007/4124ms), so the script-layer change did not help.

Added a metadata cache to generate-skills so unchanged skill sources skip file-content reads and registry regeneration. Median of 3 runs was 6083ms total (build 2114/2024/2111ms, tests 4294/3914/3972ms), worse than the current best 5909ms.

Swapped declaration generation from `tsc --emitDeclarationOnly` to `tsc -b --emitDeclarationOnly` in both package build scripts so TypeScript build mode could reuse tsbuildinfo while still regenerating missing dist outputs. Median was 6075ms total (build 2204/2118/2180ms, tests 3949/3835/3895ms), worse than the current best.

Narrowed warcraft-core TypeScript libs to ES2022 and enabled skipDefaultLibCheck to reduce declaration emit work. Median of 3 runs was 6050ms total (build 2103/2091/2026ms, tests 3962/3959/3926ms), which did not beat the current best 5909ms.

Changed opencode-warcraft default test script to run only non-e2e test files instead of discovering skipped e2e suites. Median was 5997ms total (build 2147/2163/2145ms, tests 3850/3869/3814ms). Although opencode test runtime dropped, the overall build+test metric still did not beat 5909ms, and the visible test count changed from 776 to 727 because previously skipped e2e files were no longer discovered.
